docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,031.33 FILED BY HEIDENREICH, WESLEY HEIDENREICH, TONYA AS TO DEFENDANT KARAS, EVAGELOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-30-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $161.67 AS TO DEFENDANT KARAS, EVAGELOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF WESLEY HEIDENREICH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF TANYA HEIDENREICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVAGELOS KARAS IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEIDENREICH, WESLEY HEIDENREICH, TONYA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KARAS, EVAGELOS ALTHOUGH THE LANDLORD WAS NOT TIMELY WITH HIS ITEMIZATION OF DAMAGES, HE DID PROVE TO THE COURT'S SATISFACTION THAT THE REPAIR AMOUNT EXCEEDS THE DEPOSIT AMOUNTS, EVEN DEDUCTING FROM THOSE REPAIRS, ITEMS CONSTITUTING ORDINARY WEAR AND TEAR (E.G. PAINTING). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY HEIDENREICH, WESLEY HEIDENREICH, TONYA
